title: calma/verify@1
description: The Calma artifact contract. Written as JSON (valid YAML) so scripts parse it dependency-free.

timeout.description: re-execution wall-clock budget in seconds (CLI --timeout overrides)

passthrough.description: env var NAMES forwarded into the sandbox beyond the default whitelist (PATH/HOME/LANG/LC_*/TMPDIR/PYTHON*)

split.description: leakage family: train/test split. Either {train, test} file paths, or {file, column, test_value} for a single file with a split/fold column. Absent -> leakage NOT-APPLICABLE.

keys.description: leakage family: the id / time / target columns used for entity-overlap, look-ahead, and target-leakage checks.

features.description: leakage family: the model-input columns (for target-leakage detection).

trials.description: overfitting family: the multiple-testing search size N (the number of backtested configs). Never guessed - declared here or counted from trials_artifact.

trials_artifact.description: overfitting family: path to a per-period returns matrix, one column per candidate strategy (drives PBO/CSCV and counts N).

var_sr.description: overfitting family: the sample (ddof=1) variance of the per-trial per-period Sharpes (for the Deflated Sharpe benchmark). NOTE: the `deflated_sharpe` RECIPE reads trials/var_sr from its convention string ('trials=N,var_sr=V'), not from this top-level field.

frictions.description: execution-realism family: the friction model deflated onto the return series. Absent -> realism NOT-APPLICABLE; a friction not declared is never guessed. Unknown keys are rejected (a typo is silently un-applied otherwise).

fee_bps.description: transaction cost in bps, per unit turnover

slippage_bps.description: slippage in bps, per unit turnover

borrow_bps.description: short-borrow / financing rate in bps, per period

short_frac.description: fraction of the book that is short (borrow applies to it)

turnover_col.description: per-period turnover column in the return artifact

adv.description: average daily volume (same units as size)

participation.description: fraction of ADV traded (>=1 => uninvestable at size)

leverage.description: book leverage; (L-1)*borrow is charged as financing per period

corpus.description: contamination family: the known/pretraining corpus to check the eval against. Absent -> contamination NOT-APPLICABLE; the corpus is never guessed.

manifest.description: path to the corpus file: one item per line (raw text, or a 64-hex precomputed sha256)

eval.description: path to the eval table (defaults to split.test or the headline artifact)

eval_col.description: the eval text column to check (defaults to a canonical row hash)
